properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: In sixty three the Angel came With the will and I saw my Name Then I knew am a part of God's great Family So like Jacob I will fight With the Angel day and night Till the Seven Rainbow Lights in me I see

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Mighty Angel that came to me Is Almighty God King Theophany The Pillar of Fire that's now perfecting me In that form He came to me All the way from eternity Oh Hallelujah I am sure of Victory

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Those unclean spirits just like frogs That came out of the dragon's mouth Are deceiving all the kings on earth today Religious men have been sealed out By the doctrine that came out Saying that Jesus Christ the Lord is three indeed

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Seven Spirits of our God Seven Voices thundering out The Seven Virtues of our God into my soul Supernatural devils are coming on The greatest contest now is on But by the Spirit's Sword I'll overcome them all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The Mighty Angel He's the one That my heart is centered on He's the one that means the most in all my life For He has promised in His Word Speak and in your heart believe What I ask This Mighty Angel will perform
